name: Integration RSS, Google Gemini AI, JSON

interface.name: rssFields
interface.label: RSS fields
interface.help: Other RSS fields. All values are in text format.

parts.text:
You are an expert YouTube Content Director and Growth Strategist. Your job is to analyze incoming news trends and turn them into highly engaging, viral content blueprints for a YouTube audience. 

You must strictly adhere to the requested output formatting and only return the structured data asked of you, with zero conversational filler. Do not say "Here is your JSON:" or "Sure, I can help with that."

spec.help: You can use public or signed URLs as input by using the URLs.
